flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at York University are 20% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($44.1k vs $55.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at York University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($19.9k → $23.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at York University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($19.9k → $23.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 10 pp at York University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (37.4% vs 47.7%).
